tools.name: base_get_defi_opportunities
tools.description:
Use this when you need DeFi yield opportunities specifically on Base chain. Returns Base-native protocol yields in JSON.

1. opportunities: array of yield farms ranked by APY
2. protocol: protocol name (Aerodrome, Moonwell)
3. pool: pool name and token pair
4. apy: current annual percentage yield
5.

tools.name: base_get_defi_opportunities
tools.description:
Use this when you need DeFi yield opportunities specifically on Base chain. Returns Base-native protocol yields in JSON. POST variant of base_get_defi_opportunities -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. opportunities: array of yield farms ranked by APY
2. protocol: protocol

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: base_get_defi_opportunities · Private data: base_get_defi_opportunities, base_get_defi_opportunities · Public sink: base_get_defi_opportunities.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: base_get_defi_opportunities · Private data: base_get_defi_opportunities, base_get_defi_opportunities · Public sink: base_get_defi_opportunities

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "base_get_defi_opportunities" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Use this when you need DeFi yield opportunities specifically on Base chain. Returns Base-native protocol yields in JSON.

1. opportunities: array of yield farms ranked by APY
2. protocol: protocol name (Aerodrome, Moonwell)
3. pool: pool name and token pair
4. apy: current annual percentage yield
5." → after: "Use this when you need DeFi yield opportunities specifically on Base chain. Returns Base-native protocol yields in JSON. POST variant of base_get_defi_opportunities -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. opportunities: array of yield farms ranked by APY
2. protocol: protocol"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
